title: Colour Felt Art Kit | Arts and Crafts | Kids Art Sets
features: Vibrant Creative Possibilities: Unleash your inner artist with our Colour Felt Art Set, kid's will love it!
5 Felt Boards: This kids art kit includes a set of 5 premium fun design felt boards. The designs include farm animals, monkeys, dinosaurs, unicorns and insects
6 Marker Pens: Included in this kids set is also six marker pens to help colour in your masterpieces
Mistake Proof Colouring: Go over the lines and the printed design will hide any that you make!
Perfect Gift: This art set is perfect for young budding artists and makes for an ideal holiday, birthday or Christmas gift. For ages 3 years+
description: Product Description Let imaginations run wild! Bringing creativity to life Part of the KandyToys family, Kreative Kids is an affordable range of children's arts and crafts activities great for all ages and all kinds of abilities. The range includes everything from pocket money minikits perfect for stocking fillers and gift bags to super value art kits and craft boxes, sewing kits, sand art and more! Explore arts and crafts Introduce your budding crafters to the world of arts and crafts with affordable mini kits, colouring kits and more! Learn new skills Try out new skills, give french knitting a go, or work on fine motor skills with modelling dough and cross stitch kits. Screen free play Get stuck with squishing, moulding, sculpting and explore sensory play through tactile crafts and playtime! Encourage creativity Let little ones stretch their imaginations through arts and crafts, explore unicorns, and wacky monster kits, or see where your imagination takes you!
